caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "I NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" speaks into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, featuring white mannequins wearing white shirts and racks of clothing in the background. The walls are decorated with framed photographs. In the lower-left and lower-right corners of the scene, red and white logos for "THE REALITY TOT" are visible. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expressions and gestures shift; he begins with his eyes closed, opens them to speak while gesturing with his left hand, and then settles into a steady gaze toward someone off-camera. The camera angle remains static, maintaining a medium shot of the man from the chest up throughout the clip.
